content:
Long-term, I want this system to handle everything:
• my projects and timelines
• my creative identities
• my writing, visuals, and music
• how I reflect on and remix my own work
• and even how I interact with people or show my process to the world

It sounds kind of abstract, but it’s really about building the foundation for the next chapter of my life and work—making it all scaleable, trackable, and creative at the same time.

—

::ARCHIVE_ENTRY_003
